title: hologamium nervosum
intro: Hologamium nervosum, also known as Nervilia aragoana, is a species of orchid native to New Caledonia. It is an orchid species that has been traditionally used in medicine due to its unique properties. The medicinal properties of Hologamium nervosum include its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful for treating various health issues.
